sentence: 这个场馆可以容纳上万名观众。
pinyin: Zhè ge chǎng guǎn kě yǐ róng nà shàng wàn míng guān zhòng.
english: This venue can accommodate tens of thousands of spectators.

sentence: 爷爷每天早上都听收音机里的新闻。
pinyin: Yéye měitiān zǎoshang dōu tīng shōuyīnjī lǐ de xīnwén.
english: Grandpa listens to the news on the radio every morning.

sentence: 安装前请先仔细阅读说明书。
pinyin: Ānzhuāng qián qǐng xiān zǐxì yuèdú shuōmíngshū.
english: Please read the instruction manual carefully before installation.

sentence: 科学家拍到了第一张黑洞的照片。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiā pāi dào le dì yī zhāng hēidòng de zhàopiàn.
english: Scientists captured the first photograph of a black hole.

meaning: 1. to divide into portions; 2. to package in smaller quantities; 3. to
sentence: 她把糖果分装进小袋子里。
pinyin: Tā bǎ tángguǒ fēnzhuāng jìn xiǎo dàizi lǐ.
english: She divided the candies into small bags.

meaning: 1. to bid; 2. to make a tender
sentence: 三家公司同时参与了这个项目的投标。
pinyin: Sān jiā gōngsī tóngshí cānyù le zhège xiàngmù de tóubiāo.
english: Three companies simultaneously bid on this project.

sentence: 她生了一对双生姐妹。
pinyin: Tā shēng le yī duì shuāngshēng jiěmèi.
english: She gave birth to a pair of twin sisters.

sentence: 作为一个经营者，他很注重客户关系。
pinyin: Zuòwéi yī gè jīngyíngzhě, tā hěn zhùzhòng kèhù guānxi.
english: As a business manager, he pays great attention to customer relationships.

sentence: 这档综艺节目最近非常受欢迎。
pinyin: Zhè dàng zōngyì jiémù zuìjìn fēicháng shòu huānyíng.
english: This variety show has been very popular lately.

sentence: 慈善机构为城市贫民提供免费餐食。
pinyin: Císhàn jīgòu wèi chéngshì pínmín tígōng miǎnfèi cānshí.
english: The charity provides free meals for the urban poor.

sentence: 他根据现有证据做出了合理的推论。
pinyin: Tā gēnjù xiànyǒu zhèngjù zuòchū le hélǐ de tuīlùn.
english: He made a reasonable inference based on the available evidence.

sentence: 我们在附近的咖啡馆聊了两个小时。
pinyin: Wǒmen zài fùjìn de kāfēiguǎn liáo le liǎng gè xiǎoshí.
english: We chatted at the nearby café for two hours.

sentence: 他把文件放在电脑桌面上方便查找。
pinyin: Tā bǎ wénjiàn fàng zài diànnǎo zhuōmiàn shàng fāngbiàn cházhǎo.
english: He put the files on the computer desktop for easy access.

sentence: 亚历山大大帝建立了庞大的帝国。
pinyin: Yàlìshāndà Dàdì jiànlì le pángdà de dìguó.
english: Alexander the Great established a vast empire.

sentence: 学好一门语言需要很强的自律。
pinyin: Xué hǎo yī mén yǔyán xūyào hěn qiáng de zìlǜ.
english: Mastering a language requires strong self-discipline.

meaning: 1. the two poles; 2. the north and south poles; 3. both ends of sth; 4
sentence: 地球有南北两极，气候差异很大。
pinyin: Dìqiú yǒu nán běi liǎngjí, qìhòu chāyì hěn dà.
english: The Earth has both the North and South Poles, and the climates differ greatly.

meaning: 1. to warn; 2. to alert; 3. warning; 4. cautionary
sentence: 路边的警示牌提醒司机注意弯道。
pinyin: Lùbiān de jǐngshì pái tíxǐng sījī zhùyì wāndào.
english: The warning sign on the roadside reminds drivers to watch for the curve.

sentence: 警察正在调查这起谋杀案。
pinyin: Jǐngchá zhèngzài diàochá zhè qǐ móushā àn.
english: The police are investigating this murder case.

sentence: 声音需要通过介质才能传播。
pinyin: Shēngyīn xūyào tōngguò jièzhì cái néng chuánbō.
english: Sound needs a medium in order to travel.

sentence: 地铁是最常用的交通工具之一。
pinyin: Dìtiě shì zuì cháng yòng de jiāotōng gōngjù zhī yī.
english: The subway is one of the most commonly used means of transportation.

sentence: 他们周末去玩野战，玩得很开心。
pinyin: Tāmen zhōumò qù wán yězhàn, wán de hěn kāixīn.
english: They went to play paintball on the weekend and had a great time.

meaning: 1. (theater etc) to tour; 2. to be on tour; 3. to give itinerant perfo
sentence: 这支乐队正在全国巡演。
pinyin: Zhè zhī yuèduì zhèngzài quánguó xúnyǎn.
english: This band is currently on a nationwide tour.

meaning: 1. a flourishing period; 2. period of prosperity; 3. a golden age
sentence: 唐朝是中国历史上著名的盛世。
pinyin: Táng cháo shì Zhōngguó lìshǐ shàng zhùmíng de shèngshì.
english: The Tang Dynasty was a famous golden age in Chinese history.

sentence: 这家公司的版图已扩展到海外。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī de bǎntú yǐ kuòzhǎn dào hǎiwài.
english: This company's territory has already expanded overseas.

meaning: 1. to turn one's head; 2. in no time; 3. in the twinkling of an e
sentence: 他转脸就把刚才说的话忘了。
pinyin: Tā zhuǎn liǎn jiù bǎ gāngcái shuō de huà wàng le.
english: He forgot what he just said in the blink of an eye.

sentence: 老师在课堂上展开了一张世界地图。
pinyin: Lǎoshī zài kètáng shàng zhǎnkāi le yī zhāng shìjiè dìtú.
english: The teacher unfolded a world map in class.

meaning: 1. to sort; 2. to arrange in order
sentence: 你可以按名字对这些文件进行排序。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ àn míngzi duì zhèxiē wénjiàn jìnxíng páixù.
english: You can sort these files by name.

meaning: 1. famous watch (i.e. expensive brand of wristwatch)
sentence: 他生日收到了一块名表。
pinyin: Tā shēngrì shōudào le yī kuài míngbiǎo.
english: He received a luxury watch for his birthday.

sentence: 医生在课上介绍了人体生殖器的功能。
pinyin: Yīshēng zài kè shàng jièshào le réntǐ shēngzhíqì de gōngnéng.
english: The doctor introduced the functions of human reproductive organs in class.

meaning: 1. steel (as raw material); 2. steel sheets, bars, tubes, ingots, wire
sentence: 这栋楼用了大量优质钢材。
pinyin: Zhè dòng lóu yòng le dàliàng yōuzhì gāngcái.
english: A large amount of high-quality steel was used in this building.

sentence: 这首曲子是C大调，听起来很明快。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu qǔzi shì C dàdiào, tīng qǐlái hěn míngkuài.
english: This piece is in C major and sounds very bright and lively.

sentence: 他出版了一本短篇小说合集。
pinyin: Tā chūbǎn le yī běn duǎnpiān xiǎoshuō héjí.
english: He published a collection of short stories.

sentence: 小学三年级开始学习乘法和除法。
pinyin: Xiǎoxué sān niánjí kāishǐ xuéxí chéngfǎ hé chúfǎ.
english: Third graders begin learning multiplication and division.

sentence: 义务教育阶段的学费是免费的。
pinyin: Yì wù jiào yù jiēduàn de xuéfèi shì miǎnfèi de.
english: Tuition is free during the compulsory education years.

sentence: 从台北车站搭捷运去故宫很方便。
pinyin: Cóng Táiběi chēzhàn dā jié yùn qù Gùgōng hěn fāngbiàn.
english: Taking the MRT from Taipei Main Station to the Palace Museum is very convenient.

meaning: early education (abbr. for 早期教育[zao3 qi1 jiao4 yu4])
sentence: 她每周带孩子去上两次早教课。
pinyin: Tā měi zhōu dài háizi qù shàng liǎng cì zǎo jiào kè.
english: She takes her child to early education classes twice a week.

meaning: to attach sb's name to (a role); to go by the title of; nominal; in na
sentence: 他只是挂名顾问，平时不管事。
pinyin: Tā zhǐshì guà míng gùwèn, píngshí bù guǎn shì.
english: He's just a nominal adviser—he doesn't actually handle anything.

sentence: 运动员站在领奖台上，听着国歌流下了眼泪。
pinyin: Yùndòngyuán zhàn zài lǐngjiǎngtái shang, tīngzhe guógē liú xiàle yǎnlèi.
english: Standing on the podium, the athlete shed tears while listening to the national anthem.

sentence: 我们去海滨散了个步。
pinyin: Wǒmen qù hǎibīn sàn le gè bù.
english: We took a stroll along the seaside.

meaning: supervise and urge sb. to complete a task
sentence: 父母要督促孩子养成写作业的习惯。
pinyin: Fùmǔ yào dūcù háizi yǎngchéng xiě zuòyè de xíguàn.
english: Parents should urge their children to develop the habit of doing homework.

sentence: 餐厅贴出告示，要求杜绝浪费食物的行为。
pinyin: Cān tīng tiē chū gào shì, yāo qiú dù jué làng fèi shí wù de xíng wéi.
english: The restaurant posted a notice demanding that food waste be completely eliminated.

sentence: 爷爷腿不方便，出门要坐轮椅。
pinyin: Yé ye tuǐ bù fāng biàn, chū mén yào zuò lún yǐ.
english: Grandpa has trouble with his legs and needs a wheelchair when going out.

sentence: 他花了两个小时才把家具组装好。
pinyin: Tā huā le liǎng gè xiǎo shí cái bǎ jiā jù zǔ zhuāng hǎo.
english: It took him two hours to assemble the furniture.

meaning: 1. to press close to; 2. to snuggle close; 3. intimate
sentence: 她贴近窗口，想听清楚外面的声音。
pinyin: Tā tiē jìn chuāngkǒu, xiǎng tīng qīngchǔ wàimiàn de shēngyīn.
english: She pressed close to the window, trying to hear the sounds outside more clearly.

meaning: 1. front-line; 2. forward position; 3. outpost; 4. extending ahead; 5.
sentence: 她一直在研究人工智能的前沿技术。
pinyin: Tā yīzhí zài yánjiū réngōng zhìnéng de qiányán jìshù.
english: She has been researching cutting-edge artificial intelligence technology.

sentence: 这个方案合乎公司的规定。
pinyin: Zhège fāng'àn héhū gōngsī de guīdìng.
english: This plan conforms to the company's regulations.

sentence: 他对新规定有些抵触。
pinyin: Tā duì xīn guīdìng yǒuxiē dǐchù.
english: He has some resistance to the new rules.

sentence: 他退休后写了一本回忆录，讲述自己的经历。
pinyin: Tā tuìxiū hòu xiěle yì běn huíyìlù, jiǎngshù zìjǐ de jīnglì.
english: After retiring, he wrote a memoir recounting his life experiences.

meaning: 1. to have an informal discussion; 2. CL:次[cì],個|个[gè]
sentence: 下午我们和几位专家进行了座谈。
pinyin: Xiàwǔ wǒmen hé jǐ wèi zhuānjiā jìnxíngle zuòtán.
english: This afternoon we had an informal discussion with several experts.

meaning: To climb a mountain; To climb over, to ascend onto
sentence: 我们周末去登山，风景很美。
pinyin: Wǒmen zhōumò qù dēngshān, fēngjǐng hěn měi.
english: We went mountain climbing on the weekend — the scenery was beautiful.
